display_text: Iron Talon, Cost: 0: A non-purchasable neutral item that instantly destroys a tree from 450 range. When cast on a non-player enemy unit, it removes 80% of their current HP. Enables clearing trees for vision or pathing. Stats: CD: 15s (4s for trees), Cast Range: 450 (trees), Creep Damage: 80% current HP.
search_text: chop tree item, destroy tree neutral, iron talon, tree clearing, neutral creep damage, remove tree vision, jungle utility, pathing neutral, Iron Talon
